name: Adidas
philosophy: Adidas's web presence is sports-and-streetwear editorial — the three-stripes wordmark, an unapologetic black-on-white chrome, athletic-action photography blended with high-fashion lookbook crops, and a single chromatic accent (often the season's signature color: lime, electric blue, or solar red). The atmosphere is performance-meets-runway: track athletes shot under stadium lighting and street-style models shot in deconstructed urban contexts share the same chrome.

design_language.motion_signature: Athletic-grade motion — hero carousels with hard cuts at 4-second intervals, scroll-triggered headline reveals with slight directional translate, hover on product cards triggers an alternate angle crossfade. The brand reads as kinetic-controlled.

trademark_signals: Three-stripes wordmark — the brand mark, pure black on white
Adihaus DIN typography — the proprietary modern industrial sans, runs display through body
Rectilinear product cards (0–4px radius) — sportswear precision
Black-on-white chrome with single-season chromatic accent (lime, electric blue, solar red rotate)
Athletic-action photography mixed with high-fashion lookbook crops
ai_slop_avoided: Don't introduce ornate brand-blue accents — Adidas chrome is black-on-white with season accents
Don't soften card radii above 4px — sportswear precision
Don't replace Adihaus DIN with Helvetica or Inter — the modern industrial proportions are signature
Don't stylize action photography with color filters — natural lighting is the brand
